page: Amazon Web Services c8g.12xlarge is a compute-optimized server powered by custom AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 processors utilizing the arm64 architecture. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at 2.8 GHz, with no hyperthreading. The memory configuration consists of 96.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. The instance operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Benchmark results show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth and multi-threaded operations. The server achieved top-tier ratings in large-block memory read (395.06 GB/sec) and write (184.52 GB/sec) bandwidth, alongside a top-tier Passmark memory score. Multi-threaded performance is highly competitive, evidenced by top-tier results in Geekbench multi-core tests (23908.0), software compilation using Clang (70147.0), and multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression (509.21 GB/sec). Single-core performance and LLM inference tasks generally fall into the average to strong categories.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the arm64-based Graviton architecture delivers high compute density and memory throughput without the overhead of hyperthreading. This makes the c8g.12xlarge highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores, such as software compilation, high-throughput static web serving, database operations, and multi-threaded data compression.
description: Amazon Web Services c8g.12xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized server powered by 48 dedicated physical cores of the AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and operates on the Nitro hypervisor with 22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs. Benchmarks indicate top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, multi-core processing, software compilation, and database operations, while single-core performance remains average. This hardware profile is highly efficient for multi-threaded workloads, software development pipelines, high-throughput web serving, and database management systems.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8g.12xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated Graviton Neoverse-V2 cores, 96 GB RAM, and top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.

tagline: An arm64 compute-optimized server delivering dedicated physical cores and top-tier memory bandwidth for high-throughput multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 arm64 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz.
Equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a compute-optimized 2.0 GB per core ratio.
Delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and multi-core processing benchmark results.
Features 22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the AWS Nitro hypervisor.
Best suited for software compilation, database operations, and high-throughput web serving.
